category_sources: source_facts.description says utility to deal with Parquet data; official GitHub README says parquet-tools is a utility to inspect Parquet files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses parquet-tools; source_facts.executables contains parquet-tools.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides quick start and detailed usage table of contents; official repository includes USAGE.md.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/hangxie/parquet-tools; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Parquet utility; official README lists commands for inspecting, importing, merging, schema, metadata, and other Parquet operations.
